Name: Glorious Model O Battery
Author: T3lluz

Actions.Name: Mouse battery
Actions.Tooltip: Large custom battery readout for Glorious Model O (Outfit font, SVG key art). Uses bundled Python HID reader.

Description: Live battery percentage with large rendered text and a charging bolt overlay when the mouse reports USB power or charging. Bundled Outfit font (OFL) and Heroicons bolt (MIT).
